0.q: malto-oligosyl trehalose synthase (TreY), which converts a(1A4) bonds of reducing extremities of maltodextrins into a(1A1) bonds.

Genes coding for three possible trehalose synthesis pathways are present in the genome of S. meliloti 1021: OtsA, TreYZ, and TreS. Nevertheless, the other two systems are also important for growth in hyperosmotic medium.

1.q: trehalose synthase (TreS) catalyses the conversion of maltose into trehalose.

Genes coding for three possible trehalose synthesis pathways are present in the genome of S. meliloti 1021: OtsA, TreYZ, and TreS. Nevertheless, the other two systems are also important for growth in hyperosmotic medium.

2.q: Under microaerobic conditions, the NtrY/NtrX system regulates nitrogen fixation and respiration genes... led to the demonstration that NtrY/NtrX allows for optimal expression of denitrification and nifA genes under microoxic conditions.

3.q: Trehalose was not detected in the rpoE2 mutant in the same experimental conditions... all three trehalose synthesis pathways are RpoE2 dependent.

4.q: Trehalose-6-phosphate synthase (OtsA) allows the conversion of UDP-glucose and glucose-6-phosphate into trehalose-6-phosphate.

5.q: exoY expression showed 14.7-fold higher gene expression in GRS577 mutant compared with parental strain GR4 (Table 1).

6.q: transcript levels of ntrX... revealed approximately 10-fold lower gene expression in the mutant than in the parental strain GR4... the transposon present in GRS577 was interrupting the transcription not only of the ntrY gene but also that of the downstream ntrX gene.

7.q: visN expression showed 8.1-fold lower gene expression in GRS577 mutant compared with parental strain GR4 (Table 1).

8.q: flaA expression showed 42.3-fold lower gene expression in GRS577 mutant compared with parental strain GR4 (Table 1).

9.q: srlA promoter activity is abolished in these revertant host backgrounds and in a strain carrying a deletion in cenK.

10.q: we confirm that the absence of RpoE2-dependent induction of otsA is the cause of the osmotic phenotype of the rpoE2 mutant.

11.q: We demonstrate here that all three trehalose synthesis pathways are RpoE2 dependent, but only the OtsA pathway is important for osmoinducible trehalose synthesis.

12.q: We demonstrate here that all three trehalose synthesis pathways are RpoE2 dependent, but only the OtsA pathway is important for osmoinducible trehalose synthesis.

13.q: Electromobility shift assays using purified wildtype CenR response regulator and a D55E phosphomimetic derivative suggest this protein acts as a likely Class II activator by binding promoter DNA.

14.q: OtsA has a major role in trehalose accumulation under all of the conditions tested and is the main system involved in osmoadaptation.

15.q: GRS577 was defective in swimming motility and produced fewer flagella (0.6 ± 0.2) than the parental strain GR4 (2.6 ± 0.2). Only the pJB3-ntrYX construct regained virtually all WT phenotypes.

16.q: GRS577 was defective in swimming motility and produced fewer flagella (0.6 ± 0.2) than the parental strain GR4 (2.6 ± 0.2). Only the pJB3-ntrYX construct regained virtually all WT phenotypes.

17.q: The synthesis of symbiotically active EPS II requires a functional expR gene, which is intact in Rm8530.

18.q: Although RcsR1 can influence quorum sensing via sinI, its level did not vary at different cell densities, but decreased under salt stress and increased at low temperature.

19.q: GRS577 showed a mucoid appearance... suggesting the overproduction of EPS I... Only strain 577JYX, which harbors the pJB3-ntrYX construct, regained virtually all WT phenotypes.

20.q: This pathway first involves Ngg, a bifunctional enzyme that catalyzes the formation of the intermediate N-acetylglutaminylglutamine

22.q: A zwf mutant is more sensitive than its parental strain to superoxide ions... inactivation of zwf reduced the resistance to menadione.

23.q: overproduction of RcsR1 in S. meliloti resulted in lower level and shorter half-life of sinI mRNA, and in decreased autoinducer amount.

24.q: Data revealed approximately 10-fold lower gene expression in the mutant than in the parental strain GR4 (Table 1)... the transposon present in GRS577 was interrupting the transcription not only of the ntrY gene but also that of the downstream ntrX gene.
